Usage:
  circleci [command]

Available Commands:
  api         Make an authenticated request to the CircleCI API
  artifacts   List or download run artifacts
  auth        Manage CLI auth
  completion  Manage shell completions
  context     Manage contexts
  deploy      Manage deploys
  envvar      Manage project environment variables
  info        Show project details
  job         Manage jobs
  logs        Fetch job logs
  mcp         MCP server management
  namespace   Manage orb namespaces
  open        Open the current project in the browser
  project     Manage CircleCI projects
  run         Manage runs
  runner      Manage self-hosted runners
  settings    Manage CLI settings
  version     Print version information
  workflow    Manage workflows

Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected

Use "circleci [command] --help" for more information about a command.
